description: Server-blind encrypted group management where the server stores opaque ciphertext and issues zero-knowledge credentials for group membership and group-send authorization

server_blind.note: The messaging server never stores group membership lists, group titles, group avatars, or any group metadata in plaintext; all such data is held by a separate group-management service as opaque client-encrypted blobs

credential_issuance.note: Group authentication credentials are issued in daily batches for a client-specified window up to 7 days; clients cache credentials locally and present the day-matched credential at redemption

identity_linking.note: Credentials incorporate both the ACI and PNI service identifiers so the group service can correlate identities for membership checks without the messaging server learning group structure

group_send.note: Group send tokens allow senders to prove group membership without the server learning the group identity or sender membership

access_control.note: Only authenticated accounts may request credential batches; credentials are bound to the requesting account's ACI

given: redemption_start is day-aligned and not earlier than yesterday
redemption_end is day-aligned and not later than today plus 8 days
redemption_end is not earlier than redemption_start
redemption_end is within 7 days of redemption_start
credential_batch_issued.result: Array of daily group-auth credentials and call-link auth credentials returned, one entry per day in the range, along with the account PNI

any: redemption_end is after today plus 8 days
range between redemption_start and redemption_end exceeds 7 days
redemption_start or redemption_end is not day-aligned

given: Token cryptographic verification passes against current server ZK parameters
All target service identifiers are listed in the token member set
group_send_authorized.result: Request authorized for message delivery or profile retrieval to the listed recipients

any: A target service identifier is not listed in the token member set

given: Unidentified-access key header is also present in the same request
duplicate_auth_headers.result: Request rejected because both a group send token and unidentified-access key were supplied

errors.message: Authentication required to request group credentials.
Invalid redemption time range. Range must be day-aligned, start at yesterday or later, and span at most 7 days.
Group send token is invalid or has expired.
Provide either a group send token or an unidentified-access key, not both.

events.name: group_credentials.issued
events.description: A batch of daily group authentication and call-link authentication credentials was issued for an account

events.name: group_send.authorized
events.description: A group send token was successfully verified, authorizing message delivery or profile access

events.name: group_send.rejected
events.description: A group send token failed cryptographic verification or has expired

related.reason: Group send tokens may authorize unversioned profile lookups for group members
Credential batch issuance requires account authentication
ZK credentials are derived from account identity keys managed by the key-exchange feature
Call-link auth credentials issued in this batch are consumed by the group-call-signaling feature
Credentials are bound to account identifiers; device sessions must be valid at issuance time

goals.description: Server-blind encrypted group management where the server stores opaque ciphertext and issues zero-knowledge credentials for group membership and group-send authorization

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts
Errors that auto-recover without manual intervention

constraints.description: Must degrade gracefully when dependencies are unavailable
Sensitive fields must be encrypted at rest and never logged in plaintext

tradeoffs.reason: integration failures can cascade across systems

invariants: sensitive fields are never logged in plaintext
all data access is authenticated and authorized
error messages never expose internal system details
